# DubMaster runtime requirements.
# System requirements installed by install_dubmaster.command:
# - macOS on Apple Silicon
# - Xcode Command Line Tools
# - Homebrew
# - Python 3.11
# - ffmpeg
streamlit
yt-dlp
certifi
requests
numpy
soundfile
mlx-whisper
torch
torchaudio
torchcodec
demucs
transformers
accelerate
sentencepiece
safetensors
streamlit-mic-recorder
audio-recorder-streamlit
qwen_tts
